title: smol bee
description: Small, little, tiny bees using EMF!
body:
[![A button to join vevetable's Discord server](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/061b7cfc70a1d7daa274911fd63a32c5b940b95c.png)](https://discord.com/invite/qDpgxvHH5n)
## Description


_You want smaller bees? I've got 'em!_

Includes all variants of bee: with nectar, anger, and removable stingers.

Please note that this pack does **NOT** change hitboxes


## Compatabilities


**1.18.2 and newer**: Requires EMF

**1.18.1 and older**: Requires Optifine

This pack must be placed **ABOVE** other packs that change bees using EMF (such as **Fresh Animations**!)
